codes.name: Route registered after first request
codes.description: A fix adds an @app.route inside a function that only runs after the app has started serving, so the rule is never added to the URL map. The route 404s in production while import-time tests that register everything pass.

codes.name: Trailing-slash redirect breaks POST
codes.description: A rule defined with a trailing slash triggers a 308 redirect for the slash-less POST, and many clients drop the body on redirect, so the handler receives an empty form.
